title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 108.090 - County treasurer to sell bonds
text:
108.090.  County treasurer to sell bonds. — The county treasurer of the county issuing such bonds, under the direction of the county commission, is hereby authorized to sell and dispose of all such bonds in the manner provided by law.
(RSMo 1939 § 3298, A.L. 1945 p. 597 § 3300, A.L. 1978 H.B. 971, A.L. 1990 H.B. 1621) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2911; 1919 § 1059; 1909 § 1267
